title: tragacantha micrantha
intro: Tragacantha micrantha, also known as the small-flowered hair-grass or small-flowered milk-vetch, is a type of plant species in the Fabaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to be used as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits associated with Tragacantha micrantha include its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
